chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD CP No. D- 24 of 2010 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 20.01.2016 1. For Katcha Peshi 2. For Hearing of MA 126/10 Mr. Ejaz Ali Hakro, Advocate for petitioner Mr. Fayaz Ahmed Leghari, Advocate Mr. Allah Bachayo Soomro Addl.A.G. Learned counsel for petitioner states that he is withdrawing the present petition subject to the condition that if any order in respect of the subject matter against the interest of the petitioner is passed by the present setup. He will be filing a fresh petition thereon. To such proposal the counsel appearing for respondent as well as learned A.A.G. have no objection. Accordingly in the light of above terms this petition is dismissed. JUDGE JUDGE *Karar/-
